# terrible_community_general_nosh (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the service to manage.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable the service, independently of `*.preset` file preference or running state. Mutually exclusive with `preset`. It takes effect prior to `state=reset`.
- `preset` (Boolean) Enable or disable the service according to local preferences in `*.preset` files. Mutually exclusive with `enabled`. Only has an effect if set to true. It takes effect prior to `state=reset`.
- `state` (String) `started`/`stopped` are idempotent actions that do not run commands unless necessary. `restarted` always bounces the service. `reloaded` sends a SIGHUP or starts the service. `reset` starts or stops the service according to whether it is enabled or not.
- `user` (Boolean) Run system-control talking to the calling user's service manager, rather than the system-wide service manager.

### Read-Only

- `service_path` (String) Resolved path for the service.
- `status` (String) A dictionary with the key=value pairs returned by `system-control show-json` or `none` if the service is not loaded.
